name: Recipe Using Fresh Apricot
recipeIngredient: 1 pound beef sirloin steak -- see note
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from the steak.
2. Broil the steak 4 inches from heat, for 5 to 7 minutes per side for rare or until desired doneness. Keep warm.
3. In a medium saucepan, combine the remaining ingredients. Bring to a boil and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
4. Slice the steak across the grain into thin slices.
5. Pour the apricot relish over the steak slices and serve.
